allowedArgs: pct=$(/usr/bin/pmset -g batt | /usr/bin/grep -Eo '[0-9]+%' | /usr/bin/head -1 | /usr/bin/tr -d '%'); [ -z "$pct" ] && pct=0; state=$(/usr/bin/pmset -g batt | /usr/bin/grep -Eo 'charged|charging|discharging' | /usr/bin/head -1); [ -z "$state" ] && state=unknown; echo '{"pct":'$pct',"state":"'$state'"}'
